name: Grizzly SMS
tagline: SMS verification & virtual numbers — MCP server + OpenClaw Skill
description: MCP server and OpenClaw Skill for Grizzly SMS API. Request virtual numbers for Telegram, WhatsApp, Instagram, Uber and 500+ services. Check SMS codes, manage activations, get balance, crypto wallet for top-up (USDT TRC-20). OpenClaw Skill: API key in dialog, full registration workflow, formatted output. Compatible with Cursor, Claude Desktop, OpenClaw.
